title: Royal Crimson Banarasi Silk Saree
description: A regal Banarasi weave with intricate zari motifs across the body and a richly brocaded pallu. Handcrafted in Varanasi, this saree is ideal for weddings and festive celebrations.

title: Temple Gold Kanjivaram Saree
description: Classic Kanjivaram silk with contrasting temple-border detailing and a lustrous drape. Woven on traditional looms in Kanchipuram for timeless South Indian elegance.

title: Emerald Brocade Kanjivaram
description: Deep emerald silk adorned with gold brocade peacock motifs. A statement piece for receptions and formal gatherings.

title: Ivory Pearl Banarasi Saree
description: Delicate tissue silk in soft ivory with subtle pearl-toned zari work. Lightweight and luminous — perfect for daytime ceremonies.

title: Midnight Silk Jamdani Saree
description: Fine silk jamdani with floating floral motifs on a deep navy ground. An understated luxury for evening events.

title: Saffron Tussar Silk Saree
description: Natural tussar silk with a warm saffron hue and textured hand-feel. Pairs beautifully with antique gold jewellery.

title: Bengal Cotton Jamdani Saree
description: Breathable handloom cotton with indigo jamdani motifs. A graceful everyday and summer-festival favourite.

title: Terracotta Block Print Cotton
description: Soft mul cotton with artisanal block prints in earthy terracotta tones. Easy to drape and care for.

title: Blush Ombre Chiffon Saree
description: Feather-light chiffon with a soft blush-to-rose ombre fade. Fluid movement and a contemporary silhouette.

title: Wine Georgette Sequin Saree
description: Rich wine georgette scattered with delicate gold sequin embellishment. Designed for cocktail evenings and sangeet nights.

title: Sage Handwoven Linen Saree
description: Crisp pure linen in a calming sage palette with a natural slub texture. Modern minimalism with artisan soul.

title: Sunset Linen Zari Border Saree
description: Linen-silk blend in warm coral with a fine gold zari border. Bridges casual linen comfort with festive polish.
